","type":"text/x-markdown"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/explide/README.md":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/explide/README.md","text":"# explide Interactive testcase composition IDE for TiddlyWiki. Create config tiddlers that assemble plugins, shadow tiddlers, and ad-hoc content into isolated `$testcase` sandboxes — all from within the wiki. ## Key features - **Config-driven** — each config tiddler (`rri.type: explide/config`) defines a complete testcase sandbox - **Plugin import** — import entire plugins or individual shadow tiddlers, with bulk import from filter - **Explide data** — override imported shadow tiddlers with editable copies using `$rri$:` field remapping - **Field editor** — add, edit, and delete `$rri$:` remapped fields via the FIELDS tab - **Ad-hoc tiddlers** — create text-only tiddlers inline without separate files - **Snapshot & diff** — take snapshots of explide data, compare changes, and restore previous states - **Diagnostics** — detect missing plugins, unused imports, and stale snapshots - **Layout toggle** — switch between stacked and side-by-side view - **Output tiddler** — configurable which tiddler the testcase Output tab displays (defaults to `Output`) - **ViewTemplate integration** — config tiddlers automatically render the IDE when viewed ## Prerequisites - `$:/plugins/rimir/theme` — CSS utility classes - `$:/plugins/rimir/components` — tabs and UI components - `$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz` — slider macro and UI utilities ## Quick start 1. Create a new tiddler 2. Set the field `rri.type` to `explide/config` 3. Save — the IDE appears automatically in the tiddler view 4. Use the CONFIG tab to import plugins and select shadow tiddlers 5. Create an ad-hoc tiddler named `Output` in the ADHOC tab — this is what the testcase renders 6. Click on explide data tabs to edit overridden tiddlers in EDITOR, manage fields in FIELDS, or compare in DIFF ## Bundled examples - `$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/callout-sandbox` — theme callout types - `$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/mini-app` — counter app with state management - `$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/component-lab` — pills facade components ## License MIT ","type":"text/x-markdown"},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/changelog","created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Changelog |!Version |!Date |!Changes | |v0.1.1 |2026-03-15 |Add regression tests and CI test gate | |v0.1.0 |2026-03-08 |Initial release | "},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/core-integration/ViewTemplate":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/core-integration/ViewTemplate","created":"20260112170235039","modified":"20260115074103429","tags":"$:/tags/ViewTemplate","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<%if [rri.type[explide/config]]%> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/explide/EXPLIDE"/> <%endif%>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/doc/architecture":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/doc/architecture","created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","rdt.order":"2","rdt.plugin-key":"explide","rdt.plugin-name":"explide","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Interactive testcase composition IDE","rdt.section":"Architecture","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Config structure An explide config tiddler has: |!Field |!Purpose | |`rri.type` |Must be `explide/config` — triggers ViewTemplate integration | |`rri.imported-plugins` |Space-separated list of plugin titles to import | |`rri.imported-tiddlers` |Space-separated list of individual tiddler titles to import | |`rri.output-tiddler` |Title of the tiddler to display in testcase Output (default: `Output`) | |`description` |Human-readable description shown in the testcase | |`rri.adhoc-tiddler:` |Inline text-only tiddler content | !! Explide data tiddlers When you add a shadow tiddler from an imported plugin, a new tiddler is created at `/`. This is an "explide data" tiddler. !! `$rri$:` field prefix remapping Fields on explide data tiddlers that start with `$rri$:` are remapped when assembling the `$testcase`: * `$rri$:tags` on the data tiddler becomes `tags` in the sandbox * Regular fields (like `title`, `created`) are passed through as-is, except `title` which is stripped This allows overriding any field without colliding with TiddlyWiki's own field handling. !! `$genesis` pipeline The `$data` elements inside `$testcase` are assembled via `$genesis` with three named procedures: * `explide-data-title` — computes the sandbox title by stripping the config prefix * `explide-names` — merges regular field names with stripped `$rri$:` field names * `explide-values` — merges regular field values with `$rri$:` field values !! Testcase output The `$testcase` widget uses the `testcase-output-tiddler` attribute set to the value of `rri.output-tiddler` (defaulting to `Output`). By convention, create an ad-hoc tiddler named `Output` for the main rendered content. !! Snapshot system Each explide data tiddler can have a snapshot at `:snapshot`. Snapshots are full copies created via `$action-createtiddler $template`. The DIFF tab compares the current data against its snapshot, or falls back to the original shadow tiddler. Restore overwrites the data tiddler from the snapshot. !! Ad-hoc tiddlers Fields prefixed with `rri.adhoc-tiddler:` on the config tiddler become standalone `$data` entries in the sandbox. Each becomes a simple text-only tiddler with the field suffix as its title. !! CSS consolidation Explide uses `rr-input-row`, `rr-input`, `rr-muted`, `rr-small`, `rr-callout-*` classes from the theme plugin. Plugin-specific styles (split layout, snapshot controls, config field label widths) are in `styles/base.css`. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/doc/dev-workflow":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/doc/dev-workflow","created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","rdt.order":"3","rdt.plugin-key":"explide","rdt.plugin-name":"explide","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Interactive testcase composition IDE","rdt.section":"Dev Workflow","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Plugin files |!File |!Role | |`EXPLIDE.tid` |Main IDE template — config fields, layout toggle, `$testcase` assembly | |`variables.tid` |Shared filter functions (`rri.*`) | |`core-integration/ViewTemplate.tid` |Hooks into TW ViewTemplate for `rri.type: explide/config` | |`ide-templates/tab.tid` |Top-level tab content (CONFIG, ADHOC, DIAGNOSTICS, explide data, imported tiddlers) | |`ide-templates/tabButton.tid` |Top-level tab button labels | |`ide-templates/explide/tabTemplate.tid` |Explide data sub-tabs (EDITOR, FIELDS, DIFF) with snapshot UI | |`ide-templates/config/plugins/tab.tid` |Plugin config — import toggle, shadow tiddler list, delete button, bulk import | |`ide-templates/adhoc-tiddlers/tab.tid` |Ad-hoc tiddler editor | |`ide-templates/diagnostics/tab.tid` |Diagnostics checks (missing, unused, stale) | |`examples/*.json` |Bundled example config tiddlers | |`styles/base.css` |Plugin-specific styles (extends `rr-*` from theme) | !! Restart rules |!Change |!Restart needed? | |Any `.tid` or `.json` file |Yes — plugin shadow tiddlers require restart | |`base.css` |Yes — plugin shadow tiddler | <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip"> <$fill $name="body"> Explide is 100% wikitext — no JS modules at all. However, since all files are plugin shadow tiddlers, a server restart is needed to pick up changes. !! Dependencies * ''theme'' — CSS utility classes (`rr-input-row`, `rr-input`, `rr-muted`, `rr-small`, `rr-callout-*`) * ''components'' — `tabs` facade component * ''shiraz'' — `slider` macro !! Dev samples The `_DEV/` directory contains sample config tiddlers and test data for development. These are not included in the published plugin. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/doc/examples":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/doc/examples","created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","rdt.order":"4","rdt.plugin-key":"explide","rdt.plugin-name":"explide","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Interactive testcase composition IDE","rdt.section":"Examples","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Bundled examples Three examples ship with the plugin: * [[$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/callout-sandbox]] — imports the theme plugin, renders all four callout types * [[$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/mini-app]] — counter app with `+1`/`Reset` buttons using state management * [[$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/component-lab]] — imports components + theme, demonstrates pills facades Each uses an ad-hoc tiddler named `Output` as the testcase display tiddler. !! Creating a config tiddler # Create a new tiddler (e.g., `My Test`) # Add the field `rri.type` with value `explide/config` # Save — the IDE interface appears automatically !! Importing a plugin # Open the CONFIG tab # Find your plugin in the vertical list (e.g., `$:/plugins/rimir/components`) # Check "Include Plugin into Explide?" to import the whole plugin # Click {{$:/core/images/new-button}} next to individual shadow tiddlers to add them as explide data # Use the "Bulk import from filter" slider for batch imports !! Setting up the Output tiddler # Switch to the ADHOC tab # Create a tiddler named `Output` # Write your wikitext content — this is what the testcase Output tab renders # To use a different name, set `rri.output-tiddler` in the configuration !! Using `$rri$:` field remapping When editing an explide data tiddler in the FIELDS tab: * Add a field named `tags` — this stores `$rri$:tags` on the data tiddler * In the assembled testcase, the `$rri$:tags` field is remapped to plain `tags` * This lets you override any field without interfering with TiddlyWiki's field handling !! Snapshot workflow # Open an explide data tab and switch to EDITOR # Click "Take Snapshot" to save the current state # Make changes to the tiddler # Switch to DIFF to see what changed since the snapshot # Click "Restore from Snapshot" to revert to the saved state !! Using diagnostics Switch to the DIAGNOSTICS tab to check for: * Missing imported plugins or tiddlers * Imported plugins with no shadow tiddlers used * Snapshots that are older than the current data "},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/doc/overview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/doc/overview","created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","rdt.hub-category":"development-tools","rdt.hub-category-name":"Development Tools","rdt.hub-order":"5","rdt.order":"1","rdt.plugin-key":"explide","rdt.plugin-name":"explide","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Interactive testcase composition IDE","rdt.section":"Overview","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! What it does Explide turns config tiddlers into isolated `$testcase` sandboxes. You define which plugins and shadow tiddlers to include, override fields with the `$rri$:` prefix remapping, add ad-hoc tiddlers, and see the assembled result live — all without leaving the wiki. !! Features * ''Config-driven pipeline'' — each tiddler with `rri.type: explide/config` becomes a full IDE * ''Plugin import'' — import entire plugins or cherry-pick individual shadow tiddlers * ''Bulk import'' — import multiple tiddlers at once using a filter expression * ''`$rri$:` field remapping'' — override any field on explide data tiddlers without colliding with real fields * ''Field editor'' — FIELDS tab for adding, editing, and deleting `$rri$:` remapped fields * ''Ad-hoc tiddlers'' — create simple text-only tiddlers inline for quick prototyping * ''Snapshot & diff'' — take snapshots of explide data, compare changes, and restore previous states * ''Diagnostics'' — detect missing plugins, missing tiddlers, unused imports, and stale snapshots * ''Layout toggle'' — switch between stacked and side-by-side (config + preview) layout * ''Output tiddler'' — configurable testcase output (defaults to `Output`) * ''ViewTemplate integration'' — the IDE renders automatically when viewing a config tiddler !! Quick start # Create a new tiddler and set `rri.type` to `explide/config` # Open the CONFIG tab and import a plugin (e.g., `$:/plugins/rimir/components`) # Click the {{$:/core/images/new-button}} button next to a shadow tiddler to add it as explide data # Switch to the explide data tab to edit the overridden tiddler in the EDITOR # Create an ad-hoc tiddler named `Output` — this is what the testcase Output tab renders # Use DIFF to compare your changes against the original shadow tiddler or a snapshot <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info"> <$fill $name="body">Explide is pure wikitext — no JS modules, no server restart needed. All changes take effect immediately. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/documentation":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/documentation","created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<%if [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]has[plugin-type]] %> <$tiddler tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/explide/doc/overview"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/explide/doc/overview"/> <%else%> To display this documentation, the plugin [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]] needs to be installed. See the [[readme|$:/plugins/rimir/explide/readme]] tab for a basic overview. <%endif%> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/callout-sandbox":{"created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/callout-sandbox","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","description":"Theme callout sandbox — experiment with callout types and content","rri.type":"explide/config","rri.imported-plugins":"$:/plugins/rimir/theme","rri.adhoc-tiddler:Output":"!! Try the callouts <$list filter="info warning tip danger" variable="type"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/theme/callout" type=<>> <$fill $name="body">This is a ''<>'' callout. Edit me! "},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/component-lab":{"created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/component-lab","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","description":"Components lab — experiment with pills facades","rri.type":"explide/config","rri.imported-plugins":"$:/plugins/rimir/components $:/plugins/rimir/theme","rri.adhoc-tiddler:Output":"! Components Lab !! Pills (multi-select) <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Alpha Beta Gamma Delta" selection="multi"/> !! Pills (single-select) <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/components/pills" elements="Red Green Blue" selection="single"/> !! Custom content Try editing this tiddler in the ADHOC tab to experiment with different component configurations."},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/mini-app":{"created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/mini-app","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","description":"Mini app — counter with state, demonstrating adhoc tiddlers","rri.type":"explide/config","rri.adhoc-tiddler:Output":"\define increment() <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/counter" text={{{[{$:/state/counter}add[1]]}}}/> \end \define reset() <$action-setfield $tiddler="$:/state/counter" text="0"/> \end ! Counter: {{{[{$:/state/counter}else[0]]}}} <$button actions=<>>+1 <$button actions=<>>Reset","rri.adhoc-tiddler:README":"This is a minimal counter app built entirely with adhoc tiddlers inside an explide sandbox. It demonstrates: * State management with `$:/state/` tiddlers * Action widgets (`$action-setfield`) * Filtered transclusion (`{{{ }}}`) Open the ''ADHOC'' tab to edit the source."},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples","created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Examples Bundled explide configs demonstrating key features. Click to open: <$list filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]prefix[$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/]]">
<$link/> — <$view field="description"/>
Each example uses an ad-hoc tiddler named `Output` as the testcase display tiddler. Open the ADHOC tab to edit the source, or use CONFIG to explore imported plugins. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/ide-templates/adhoc-tiddlers/tabButton":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/ide-templates/adhoc-tiddlers/tabButton","code-body":"yes","created":"20260114125322673","modified":"20260114135002822","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\import $:/plugins/rimir/explide/variables {{{[removeprefix]}}}"},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/ide-templates/config/plugins/tab":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/ide-templates/config/plugins/tab","code-body":"yes","created":"20260112153045190","modified":"20260115150217889","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\import $:/plugins/rimir/explide/variables \procedure rr.ac.add-shadow-tiddler(explideConfigTiddler, shadowTiddler) <$action-createtiddler $template=<> $basetitle=`$(explideConfigTiddler)$/$(shadowTiddler)$`> \end <$set name="pluginTiddler" value=<>> <$checkbox filter="[contains:rri.imported-pluginsthen[yes]else[no]]" checked="yes" unchecked="no" checkactions="""<$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field="rri.imported-plugins" $subfilter=<>/>""" uncheckactions="""<$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field="rri.imported-plugins" $subfilter=`-$(pluginTiddler)$`/>""" > Include Plugin into Explide?

<%if [{{{[addsuffixis[tiddler]]}}}]%> Snapshot exists (modified: <$view tiddler={{{[addsuffix]}}} field="modified" format="date" template="YYYY-0MM-0DD 0hh:0mm"/>) <%else%> No snapshot <%endif%> <$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" actions=""" <$action-createtiddler $template=<> $basetitle={{{[addsuffix]}}} $overwrite="yes"/> """>{{$:/core/images/save-button}} Take Snapshot <%if [{{{[addsuffixis[tiddler]]}}}]%> <$reveal type="nomatch" stateTitle={{{[addsuffix[/state/confirm-restore]]}}} text="yes"> <$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" actions="""<$action-setfield $tiddler={{{[addsuffix[/state/confirm-restore]]}}} text="yes"/>""">{{$:/core/images/refresh-button}} Restore from Snapshot <$reveal type="match" stateTitle={{{[addsuffix[/state/confirm-restore]]}}} text="yes"> Are you sure? <$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" actions=""" <$action-createtiddler $template={{{[addsuffix]}}} $basetitle=<> $overwrite="yes"/> <$action-setfield $tiddler={{{[addsuffix[/state/confirm-restore]]}}} text="no"/> """>Yes <$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink" actions="""<$action-setfield $tiddler={{{[addsuffix[/state/confirm-restore]]}}} text="no"/>""">No <%endif%>
<%elseif [match[FIELDS]]%>
''Remapped fields'' (stored as `$rri$:`, remapped to `` in sandbox) <$list filter="[fields[]prefixsort[]]" variable="fieldName">

<%endif%>"},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/readme","created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! explide Interactive testcase composition IDE for TiddlyWiki. Create config tiddlers that assemble plugins, shadow tiddlers, and ad-hoc content into isolated `$testcase` sandboxes — all from within the wiki. !! Key features * ''Config-driven'' — each config tiddler (`rri.type: explide/config`) defines a complete testcase sandbox * ''Plugin import'' — import entire plugins or individual shadow tiddlers, with bulk import from filter * ''Explide data'' — override imported shadow tiddlers with editable copies using `$rri$:` field remapping * ''Field editor'' — add, edit, and delete `$rri$:` remapped fields via the FIELDS tab * ''Ad-hoc tiddlers'' — create text-only tiddlers inline without separate files * ''Snapshot & diff'' — take snapshots of explide data, compare changes, and restore previous states * ''Diagnostics'' — detect missing plugins, unused imports, and stale snapshots * ''Layout toggle'' — switch between stacked and side-by-side view * ''Output tiddler'' — configurable which tiddler the testcase Output tab displays (defaults to `Output`) * ''ViewTemplate integration'' — config tiddlers automatically render the IDE when viewed !! Prerequisites * [[$:/plugins/rimir/theme]] — CSS utility classes (`rr-*`) * [[$:/plugins/rimir/components]] — tabs and UI components * [[$:/plugins/kookma/shiraz]] — slider macro and UI utilities !! Quick start # Create a new tiddler # Set the field `rri.type` to `explide/config` # Save — the IDE appears automatically in the tiddler view # Use the CONFIG tab to import plugins and select shadow tiddlers # Create an ad-hoc tiddler named `Output` in the ADHOC tab — this is what the testcase renders # Click on explide data tabs to edit overridden tiddlers in EDITOR, manage fields in FIELDS, or compare in DIFF !! Bundled examples * `$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/callout-sandbox` — theme callout types * `$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/mini-app` — counter app with state management * `$:/plugins/rimir/explide/examples/component-lab` — pills facade components "},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/settings":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/settings","created":"20260308120000000","modified":"20260308120000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"
No configurable settings. Future settings will appear here.
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/styles/base.css":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/styles/base.css","text":".rri-adhoc-field textarea { width: 100%; } /* Config fields — extends rr-input-row from theme */ .explide-config-fields { margin-bottom: 0.5em; } .explide-config-fields .rr-input-row label { white-space: nowrap; min-width: 10em; } .explide-config-fields .rr-input { width: 20em; flex: none; } /* Snapshot controls */ .explide-snapshot-controls { margin: 0.5em 0; padding: 0.5em 0; border-top: 1px solid <>; } /* Split layout */ .explide-split { display: flex; gap: 1em; } .explide-split > .explide-pane-config, .explide-split > .explide-pane-preview { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .explide-split { flex-direction: column; } } ","created":"20260115092620092","modified":"20260115093251989","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/css"},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/test/test-procedures":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/test/test-procedures","description":"Test explide helper functions for data resolution","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki-multiple","tags":"[[$:/tags/wiki-test-spec]]","text":"title: MyExplideConfig rri.imported-tiddlers: Tiddler1 Tiddler2 type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki Explide config + title: MyExplideConfig/Tiddler1 type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki Content of tiddler 1 + title: MyExplideConfig/Tiddler2 type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki Content of tiddler 2 + title: Output \whitespace trim \function rri.pathy-children(tiddler) [prefix]-[] \function rri.imported-tiddlers(explideConfigTiddler) [get[rri.imported-tiddlers]enlist-input[]] \function rri.explide-data(explideConfigTiddler) [function[rri.pathy-children],] \function rri.explide-tiddlers(explideConfigTiddler) [function[rri.explide-data],removeprefixremoveprefix[/]] \function rri.get-source-data(explideConfigTiddler, explideDataTiddler) [removeprefixremoveprefix[/]] imported:<$text text={{{ [function[rri.imported-tiddlers],[MyExplideConfig]count[]] }}}/>,data:<$text text={{{ [function[rri.explide-data],[MyExplideConfig]count[]] }}}/>,names:<$text text={{{ [function[rri.explide-tiddlers],[MyExplideConfig]sort[]join[,]] }}}/>,src:<$text text={{{ [function[rri.get-source-data],[MyExplideConfig],[MyExplideConfig/Tiddler1]] }}}/> + title: ExpectedResult

imported:2,data:2,names:Tiddler1,Tiddler2,src:Tiddler1

+ title: Narrative Verifies explide helper functions resolve imported tiddlers, data children, names, and source data correctly. "},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/explide/test-edition/tiddlywiki.info":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/explide/test-edition/tiddlywiki.info","text":"{ "description": "Test edition for explide", "plugins": [ "tiddlywiki/jasmine", "rimir/explide" ], "themes": [ "tiddlywiki/vanilla", "tiddlywiki/snowwhite" ] } ","type":".info"},"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/variables":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/explide/variables","code-body":"yes","created":"20260112144815266","modified":"20260115152516319","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\procedure snapshot-suffix() :snapshot \procedure adhoc-field-prefix() rri.adhoc-tiddler: \procedure adhoc-src-field-prefix() rri.adhoc-tiddler-src: \function rri.pathy-children(tiddler) [prefix]-[] \function rri.imported-tiddlers(explideConfigTiddler) [get[rri.imported-tiddlers]enlist-input[]] \function rri.explide-data(explideConfigTiddler) [function[rri.pathy-children],!suffix] \function rri.explide-tiddlers(explideConfigTiddler) [function[rri.explide-data],removeprefixremoveprefix[/]] \function rri.is-explide-data(explideConfigTiddler, tiddler) [removeprefixprefix[/]] \function rri.is-explide-tiddler(explideConfigTiddler, tiddler) [function[rri.explide-data],match] \function rri.get-source-data(explideConfigTiddler, explideDataTiddler) [removeprefixremoveprefix[/]] \function rri.get-snapshot-data(explideConfigTiddler, explideDataTiddler) [addsuffixis[tiddler]]:else[function[rri.get-source-data],,] \function rri.is-plugin-imported(explideConfigTiddler, pluginTiddler) [contains:rri.imported-plugins] \function rri.is-any-plugin-member-used(explideConfigTiddler, pluginTiddler) [function[rri.explide-tiddlers],is[shadow]shadowsource[]match] \function rri.is-plugin-involved(explideConfigTiddler, pluginTiddler) [function[rri.is-plugin-imported],,] [function[rri.is-any-plugin-member-used],,] +[count[]compare:number:gt[0]then[yes]else[no]]"}}}
